method: Compiler analysis + PLCSIM Advanced (offline simulation mode)

error_stats.note: DA bound validated via compiler analysis (Section IV-D). Python float32 vs SCL REAL arithmetic guaranteed by IEEE 754 single-precision with DA overestimation margin >= 6x.

cycle_stats.note: WCET bound from Theorem 10 per-edge S7-1200 instruction analysis. Measured Z3-verified WCET: 2.86ms for LUT path (E25). Full SCL WCET: 22.67ms per edge analysis (Appendix).

analysis_method: Per-edge instruction counting (S7-1200 CPU 1211C datasheet) + Z3-verified WCET for LUT kernel (2.86ms, E25) + Parameterized WCET formula (Theorem 10)
